seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO X7 Pro, Dimensity 8400-Ultra, AMOLED, 120Hz, 50MP OIS camera, IP68, 6000mAh, 90W HyperCharge, LPDDR5X, UFS 4.0, WildBoost Optimization, LiquidCool Technology, HyperOS 2, Android 15, Global
seo_data.meta_title: POCO X7 Pro: Flagship Performance, CrystalRes AMOLED Display
seo_data.meta_description: Experience the POCO X7 Pro with Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra, CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED, 50MP OIS camera, 6000mAh battery with 90W HyperCharge, and IP68 dust/water resistance.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO X7 Pro redefines speed and performance, powered by the flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor built on TSMC's advanced 4nm process. This device delivers superior gaming and multitasking capabilities with its world-first ARM Cortex-A725 CPU architecture and an All-Big-Core design, achieving an impressive AnTuTu score of up to 1,704,330. Enhanced by WildBoost Optimization 3.0 and the POCO 3D IceLoop cooling system, the X7 Pro ensures stable picture quality, frame rates, and efficient thermal management even during prolonged, intense usage, making it a powerhouse for hardcore users.

Beyond raw power, the POCO X7 Pro features a stunning CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display with ultra-slim bezels, supporting 68 billion colors, Dolby Vision, and HDR10+ for an immersive viewing experience. Its robust 6000mAh (typ) battery supports 90W HyperCharge, reaching 100% in approximately 42 minutes, ensuring you stay powered throughout the day. Photography is handled by a versatile 50MP main camera with OIS and an 8MP ultrawide lens, complemented by a 20MP front camera, offering advanced features for both stills and video. Designed for durability, the X7 Pro boasts an IP68 dust and water resistance rating, providing strong protection against elements.

range_overview:
The POCO X7 Pro emerges as a formidable smartphone, engineered for users demanding peak performance and a premium multimedia experience. At its core, it features the Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor, utilizing a 4nm manufacturing process and an innovative ARM Cortex-A725 CPU architecture. This powerful chipset, combined with LPDDR5X RAM and UFS 4.0 storage, ensures seamless multitasking, rapid app loading, and exceptional gaming performance, validated by an AnTuTu score reaching up to 1,704,330.

The device's visual prowess is delivered through a 6.67-inch CrystalRes AMOLED display, offering a 1.5K resolution (2712 x 1220 pixels) and a buttery-smooth 120Hz refresh rate. With peak brightness of 3200 nits, 12-bit color depth, Dolby Vision, HDR10+, and Corning Gorilla Glass 7i protection, it provides vibrant, detailed, and durable visuals. The camera system is led by a 50MP main sensor with Optical Image Stabilization (OIS), capable of 4K video recording, alongside an 8MP ultrawide camera and a 20MP front camera, catering to diverse photographic needs with features like Night mode, Portrait mode, and AI beautify.

Durability and longevity are key strengths of the POCO X7 Pro. It comes with an IP68 rating for dust and water resistance, providing robust protection. A substantial 6000mAh (typ) battery supports 90W HyperCharge technology, enabling a full charge in just 42 minutes. The phone runs on Android 15 with Xiaomi HyperOS 2, integrating WildBoost Optimization 3.0 for enhanced gaming and the POCO 3D IceLoop cooling system for sustained optimal performance. Connectivity options include Dual SIM 5G, Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax), Bluetooth 6.0, NFC, and a comprehensive navigation suite with GPS, GLONASS, BDS, Galileo, and NavIC.
sales_arguments: Equipped with the Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor and LPDDR5X + UFS 4.0 for elite performance and responsiveness.
Features a stunning 6.67" CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display with 3200 nits peak brightness and Gorilla Glass 7i protection.
Long-lasting 6000mAh (typ) battery with 90W HyperCharge for rapid charging to 100% in 42 minutes.
Capture high-quality photos and videos with a 50MP main camera with OIS and a 20MP front camera with AI features.
Boasts an IP68 dust and water resistance rating, ensuring robust protection against environmental elements.
Integrated LiquidCool Technology 4.0 and WildBoost Optimization 3.0 provide sustained performance during intensive use and gaming.

technical_specifications.CPU: Octa-core (1x3.25 GHz Cortex-A725 & 3x3.0 GHz Cortex-A725 & 4x2.1 GHz Cortex-A725)
technical_specifications.Display Features: Dolby Vision, HDR10+, 1920Hz PWM Dimming, 16,000-level brightness adjustment, Sunlight mode, Reading mode, TÜV Rheinland Low Blue Light Certification, TÜV Rheinland Flicker Free Certification
technical_specifications.Rear Camera (Main): 50 MP, f/1.5, 26mm (wide), 1/1.95" sensor size, 0.8µm (1.6µm with 4-in-1 binning), PDAF, OIS, 6P lens
technical_specifications.Rear Camera Features: LED flash, HDR, Panorama, Dynamic shots, Motion tracking focus, Motion capture, 50MP mode, Portrait mode, Documents, Night mode, Pro mode
technical_specifications.Rear Video Recording: 4K@24/30/60fps, 1080p@30/60/120/240/960fps, 720p@30/120/240/960fps, HDR10+, gyro-EIS, OIS, Director model, Video pro mode, Video log format, ShootSteady, Slow, Dual video, Time-lapse
technical_specifications.Front Camera Features: Soft-light ring, AI beautify, Night mode, Portrait mode
technical_specifications.Charging: 90W wired HyperCharge (100% in 42 min), 90W in-box charger
technical_specifications.Audio: Dual stereo speakers, Dolby Atmos®, Hi-Res Audio, Hi-Res Wireless Audio, MP3, FLAC, AAC, OGG, WAV, AMR, AWB playback
technical_specifications.Navigation & Positioning: GPS (L1+L5), GLONASS (G1), BDS (B1I+B1c+B2a), GALILEO (E1+E5a), NavIC (L5), Electronic compass
technical_specifications.Sensors: In-screen Fingerprint sensor (optical), AI Face Unlock, Accelerometer, Gyroscope, Proximity sensor, 360° Ambient light sensor, Electronic compass, IR Blaster, X-axis linear vibration motor, Flicker Sensor
technical_specifications.Network Support: Dual SIM (Nano-SIM + Nano-SIM), Dual Standby (5G+5G, 5G+4G), 5G / 4G / 3G / 2G bands (specific bands listed in documentation)
technical_specifications.Build: Glass front (Gorilla Glass 7i), Plastic back / Silicone polymer back (eco leather)
technical_specifications.Durability: IP68 dust and water resistance (IP69 market/region dependent)
